name: Nib Holdings Limited
analysis: NHF has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$6.8609. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$6.9067 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$6.8609, stop A$6.2370, target A$6.9000. Risk/reward is 0.06:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
